Nearly 5000 members and sym.
pathixers Of the Industrial Work
ers % the World are preparing
here today 20 launch I great fight
agslnst 6pokane'a police depart
ment, which 10 attempting to abol-
lsh street speaking. without OBJ
servlnp the customary formality Of
sxicket purchasing, 500 rescruits for
epokane's 1000 revolufionists
Boarded trains out Of Portland,
Ore, this morning and are now on
their way here 70 assist IN the do
termlned and stubborn conquest
FOR free speech that will begin
here tomorrow.


A telegram was received this
morning by local officials Of the
1 l. w. w. from #. II. Little, leader
of band Of revolutionists In
Kalispell. Mont, stating that 500
members and sympathizers of the
Industrial Workers OF the World
were ready and waiting there to
come taa Spokane and go to jail


With the rest Of them for the cause.


They will not advance to Spokane


TIL the local officials issue a call
for them, however.


In police circles, preparations
are also being made, and before


tomorrow night both county and
city jails may be crowded to their
capacities with the radicals OF the


revolutionary forces. In case OF
riot, city authorities threaten to
call on the state militia for as
eistance, and In such event there
will likely be bloodshed.


I'VE are not figuring on rioting,
but we figure on fighting the po-
lice with our tongues" Secretary
Filingo OF the local band of l. w.
WIS announced to representa-
tive Of The Press this morning.
I'VE have both women and men to
speak. and as soon as the police
arrest one speaker for addressing
the crowds on the streets, hun
dreds of others will be ready to
mount the stand In their place. 1t
It's ridiculous for the police to think
that they can take away our
rights to free speech, for that Is a


liberty given every man in Ameri-


ca by the constitution of the


United States.


1 when we gave q demonstration
against the city's anti-street speak
ing ordinance here a year ago. the
police effected truce with us by


asking us to be quiet till they


could make a test case in the ar
rest of Organizer Walsh. That


case has never been brought to


the supreme court. though we were


given promises of expediency. Now


We are tired Of waiting and we are
going in to fight the police until
| we win our point
